memberdef.name: BIND_LOBBY_NOTIFICATION
memberdef.initializer: typedef AccelByte::Api::Lobby::FV2##NotificationDelegateName##Notif F##Verb##NotificationDelegate; \ const F##Verb##NotificationDelegate On##Verb##NotificationDelegate = F##Verb##NotificationDelegate::CreateThreadSafeSP(SharedThis(this), &FOnlineSessionV2AccelByte::On##Verb##Notification, LocalUserNum); \ ApiClient->Lobby.SetV2##NotificationDelegateName##NotifDelegate(On##Verb##NotificationDelegate); \
